verse_text: And He looked around in a circle at those who sat about Him, and said, 'Here are My mother and My brothers!

links.context: Some Orthodox commentators see the Bride calling the Bridegroom a brother who could nurse at my mother's breasts as a veiled reference to the Incarnation of the Son of God. For the Lord addressed His followers, saying, "Here are My mother and My brothers" ([[MRK.3:34]]). St. Athanasius, in his Paschal Letter of 329, writes concerning 8:1, "The God of all, the Maker of times and seasons, who knows our affairs better than we do ... so also does He send [Christ] not unseasonably, but seasonably." St. Paul teaches that Christ came in "the fullness of the time" ([[GAL.4:4]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
